commit.author: FlexNetOS <flexnetos@de-flex.net>

lines.content: ## Summary
The meta estate runs multi-mission autonomous development through a witnessed loop: fresh worktrees
→ PRs → real CI → GitHub-native auto-merge, with progress checkpointed into the handoff kernel's
tamper-evident fleet ledger. Four parallel mission lanes landed major tranches on 2026-06-12:
upgrade mission (census/ADRs/P7 fleet seeding), FIX-MISSION (enforcement kit + defect closures),
portability wave 1 (ADR-0006), and the app/runner control plane (ADR-0007/0008). The hf kernel verb
tranche is in flight in its own single-writer lane.
<!-- generated by `hf sync` from ledger truth — do not hand-edit (ONE-WAY ledger→kb) -->
## Milestones
- [x] Initialize FlexNetOS Knowledge Base; verify meta build/test from source (historical).
portability wave 1 (ADR-0006), and the app/runner control plane (ADR-0007/0008). The hf kernel verb
tranche is in flight in its own single-writer lane.
## Milestones
- [x] Initialize FlexNetOS Knowledge Base; verify meta build/test from source (historical).
- [x] Ollama provider + workspace standardization in .meta.yaml (historical).
- [x] UPGRADE MISSION: 62-unit census (ARCHITECTURE-TRUTH.md), 15-item GAP-REGISTER, NORTH-STAR,
COGNITUM-SEED analysis, MIROFISH-PORT-PLAN (teri = vehicle, shimmy = inference slot).
- [x] ADR-0003/0004/0005 merged; policy P7; 21 A/B repos seeded with .handoff; 20 fork capsules central.
- [x] Steward model live (witnessed verdicts; scope law after 2× classifier boundary).
- [x] FIX-6 enforcement kit: kernel = the only handoff path (guard-enforced, CI-linted, skill-guided).
- [x] All four stuck P7 PRs resolved or in flight (meta#15 ✓, atc#2 ✓, rusty-idd#40→#39, prompt_hub#77 diagnosing).
- [x] kb silent-drop incident RESOLVED (workspaces/main path migration; backfills committed).
- [ ] FIX-1 teri (in flight) · FIX-5 smalls · prompt_hub#77 · kernel verbs (handoff session 2b/3).
## Progress — meta
## Key Findings
- **Loop**: GitHub-native auto-merge with required checks is the reliable landing path — manual
- [x] kb silent-drop incident RESOLVED (workspaces/main path migration; backfills committed).
- [ ] FIX-1 teri (in flight) · FIX-5 smalls · prompt_hub#77 · kernel verbs (handoff session 2b/3).
## Key Findings
- **Loop**: GitHub-native auto-merge with required checks is the reliable landing path — manual
merges have been zero across 20+ PRs; BEHIND states need an update-branch nudge.
- **Concurrency**: 3–4 sessions share this workspace; weave messages + leases + single-writer lanes
(hf/src) prevent collisions; always re-verify HEAD after pulls (untracked-file collisions from
sibling sessions are common).
- **Tool drift bites silently**: the kb 0.2.10 workspace path migration produced empty-body commits
with zero errors; binaries copied to ~/.local/bin instead of symlinked into meta hide version drift.
- **Fork-environment mismatches**: upstream CI assumptions (self-hosted macOS runners, org PATs)
queue or fail forever in the fork — fix-forward in workflows, never merge red.
Done: 0/2.
## Next Steps
- Finish FIX-MISSION tranche (teri PR, smalls, prompt_hub#77), then Phase 6 verify + docs + memoir.
- **Fork-environment mismatches**: upstream CI assumptions (self-hosted macOS runners, org PATs)
queue or fail forever in the fork — fix-forward in workflows, never merge red.
## Next Steps
- Finish FIX-MISSION tranche (teri PR, smalls, prompt_hub#77), then Phase 6 verify + docs + memoir.
- Consume hf verb tranche as it merges (sync-cards refresh of the 22 stale cards = D3 closure).
- Owner queue: NEEDS-HUMAN A–D, G–H, walls 1–8 (see NEEDS-HUMAN.md).
- MiroFish P1 (wire the spine) per MIROFISH-PORT-PLAN once FIX-1 lands.
### Open cards
- [P1] KBTASK-LIBSQL-BATON-REFRESH — libSQL Hrana baton-refresh: reconnect on invalid baton
- [P1] KBTASK-SEED-UNLOCK-UNDER-SYSTEMD — Seed-unlock under systemd: switch seed_factor from ssh to REST custody API over Cognitum CA
## Cross-Repo Scope
Touched this wave: meta(root), agent, harness_hub, atc, rusty-idd, teri (worktree), handoff
- Owner queue: NEEDS-HUMAN A–D, G–H, walls 1–8 (see NEEDS-HUMAN.md).
- MiroFish P1 (wire the spine) per MIROFISH-PORT-PLAN once FIX-1 lands.
## Cross-Repo Scope
Touched this wave: meta(root), agent, harness_hub, atc, rusty-idd, teri (worktree), handoff
(other session), prompt_hub (pending), claude-plugins/vault_hub/shimmy (queued FIX-5).
Keep in view: loop_lib, meta_cli/core (canon untouched), envctl (docs note only; phases 6–8 off-limits).
